summary: Applied two micro-edits to tighten chapter boundary continuity: clarified carryover from Chapter 7's unsent Ada draft text and sharpened overnight rain setup for Chapter 9's wet-morning opening.
edits: Opening paragraph now explicitly states the church-wall draft text was sent before Marisol commits to dinner at Ada's.
Closing rain line now cues slick dawn sidewalks to better hand off into the next chapter's wet transit scene.
